properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: People say that our God's dead, He has no power or might, They deny that He's living, Say this faith is alive, We can't help that they say this, For they do not understand, They wonder and reason, Think Jesus was just a man.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But what about the Truth? What about the light? What about the Message? Is it still alive? Just think upon His goodness, That's He's done in your life, It's not just some story, Gods power is Alive!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Many people are leaving, God's voice in this day, They are leaning to reason, And the worlds filthy way, But we have a vision, There's no power can hold us back, Just stay faithful with Jesus, And He'll keep you on track!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is still the truth, This is still the light, This is still the Message, Oh yes it is Alive! Just think upon His goodness that He's done in your life, It's not just some story, Gods power is alive!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just think upon His goodness, That He's done in your life, It's not just some story, Gods power is Alive! It's not just some story. Gods power is alive. Gods power is alive!
